description.content: Time series data retrieval and management

Returns time series data for a specified location and parameter. Supports retrieval of streamflow, gage height, reservoir levels, temperature, and other continuous measurements. Results are paginated for large datasets.

query.description: USACE district office ID (e.g., CWMS, SWT, LRH)
Start of the time window (ISO 8601 or milliseconds since epoch)
End of the time window (ISO 8601 or milliseconds since epoch)
Elevation datum for stage data (e.g., NAVD88, NGVD29)
Unit of measure for the output (e.g., EN for English, SI for metric)
Timezone for date/time values in response
Page cursor for pagination (from previous response)

description.content: Returns a catalog of available time series identifiers.

query.description: Filter by USACE district office ID
Regular expression pattern to filter time series IDs

description.content: CWMS monitoring locations and metadata
Returns a list of CWMS monitoring locations matching the specified criteria. Locations represent physical sites where measurements are taken or water management occurs.

query.description: Filter by USACE district office ID
Pipe-separated list of location IDs to retrieve
Unit system for coordinates (EN or SI)

description.content: Returns details for a single CWMS monitoring location.
Returns a searchable catalog of all available CWMS locations.

query.description: Filter by USACE district office ID

description.content: Returns hydrologic basins defined in CWMS.
Rating curves and tables
Returns rating curves used to convert gage height (stage) measurements to discharge (streamflow) values. Rating curves are essential for computing streamflow from continuous stage measurements.

query.description: Pattern mask to filter rating IDs
Start of the time window for effective ratings
End of the time window for effective ratings

description.content: Location levels and pool data
Returns location level data including pool elevations, flood stages, and operational thresholds for CWMS monitoring locations.
Returns reservoir pool definitions including storage zones, flood control pools, and conservation pools for USACE projects.

query.description: Pattern mask to filter project IDs
Pattern mask to filter pool names

Returns a catalog of available time series identifiers.

description.content: Returns the list of CWMS parameters available for time series and location level queries (e.g., Stage, Flow, Elev, Temp-Water).
Returns the list of measurement units available in the CWMS system.
Returns the list of US states recognized in the CWMS system.
Returns the list of US counties with CWMS location data.
USACE district offices
Returns a list of USACE district offices with their identifiers and information. Offices are used to scope data queries within the CWMS system.
USACE projects and reservoirs
Returns USACE projects such as reservoirs, navigation projects, and flood control structures with their operational parameters.

Pattern mask to filter project IDs

description.content: Lock and waterway navigation data
Field measurements and observations
Returns field measurement data collected at CWMS locations including streamflow discharge measurements used for rating curve development.

query.description: Unit system for output values (EN or SI)

info.name: USACE Corps Water Management System Data API

description.content: The Corps Water Management System Data API (CDA) is a REST service providing programmatic access to USACE water management data. It supports retrieval of time series measurements, monitoring locations, rating curves, reservoir pool levels, lock data, and operational information across Army Corps of Engineers projects. Public data is accessible without authentication; write operations require an API key.
